steps.title: Identify what would support the conclusion
steps.content: The student concludes that Glory and Boss “behaved similarly” in the sound trials. For data to support this conclusion, the two snakes must show the same response—either both moved toward or both moved away from the sound.

steps.title: Match the data to the choices
steps.content: Choice C states that both moved away from the sound, demonstrating the identical behavior needed to support the conclusion. Choices A and B don't directly compare Glory and Boss (they feature Bitey Boy instead), and choice D shows opposite responses, contradicting the conclusion. This matches choice C — C is correct.
